arts.ttl: 'Outstanding' - Manchester United academy complete another stunning comeback after goalkeeper assist
arts.sum: Man Utd's U21s drew 3-3 with Doncaster in the EFL Trophy and brought the score level with the last kick of the game.

arts.ttl: Man Utd vs Twente: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Manchester United kick off their 2024/25 Europa League campaign by hosting Dutch side FC Twente on Wednesday evening. United beat Dutch opposition the last time they lifted the Europa League, defeating Ajax 2-0 in the 2016/17 final under Jose Mourinho.

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Man Utd to make Barella offer; Real Madrid prepare Saliba swap bid
arts.sum: Barcelona would like to acquire Jamal Musiala from Bayern Munich, but are seriously concerned they will not be able to financially compete with Real Madrid or Man City . Liverpool, Man City and Barcelona remain interested in the versatile midfielder.

arts.ttl: Man United star takes huge step towards injury return at the perfect time for Erik ten Hag
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United injury news with a positive update on Tyrell Malacia coming to light for Erik ten Hag

arts.ttl: Paul Scholes voices major Arsenal concern as Man Utd legend makes four-word claim
arts.sum: Manchester United legend Paul Scholes has discussed Arsenal's start to the season and the Gunners' chances of toppling Manchester City in the Premier League title race

arts.ttl: Paul Scholes questions Erik ten Hag over Marcus Rashford call – ‘Come on’
arts.sum: Old Trafford icon Paul Scholes has questioned Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag's decision to bench Marcus Rashford immediately after hitting a purple patch

arts.ttl: Steve McLaren reveals why Erik ten Hag had to axe Cristiano Ronaldo at Man Utd
arts.sum: Former Manchester United assistant coach Steve McClaren has given his verdict on Erik ten Hag's handling of Cristiano Ronaldo after the Ballon d'Or winner decided to quit the club in 2022

arts.ttl: Gareth Southgate waiting for Man Utd to sack Ten Hag
arts.sum: Southgate is highly respected by new Man Utd part-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe, who considered the coach his number one choice to replace Ten Hag had the Dutchman been sacked this past summer. Southgate announced his departure from England after Euro 2024 following eight years in the job.

arts.ttl: Paul Scholes points finger at Erik ten Hag for Man Utd problem: 'Do me a favour!'
arts.sum: Manchester United are struggling to find the back of the net in the Premier League following their stalemate at Crystal Palace and Paul Scholes has given their forwards a withering assessment

arts.ttl: Leny Yoro tells Rio Ferdinand why he joined Man Utd instead of Real Madrid
arts.sum: Leny Yoro looked set to join Real Madrid from Lille in the summer, only for Manchester United to muscle in and use Rio Ferdinand to tempt the 18-year-old Frenchman
